current_state_batch002_003.fact: Batch 002 adds LLM-facing operational crosswalk/indices; Batch 003 adds proof-obligation cards and routing indices. Creative expansion pack is staged under docs/idea-db and must not enter YangMillsCore or source proof.

agent_checklists.fact: Before opening a paper, agents should search/show keys and read SOURCE-KEY-ROUTER; before hypothesis removal, identify the exact field and theorem, then build and oracle-check.

source_key_router.fact: The same source key may route to multiple proof cards; cmp116.eq231.p-family-carrier-source-target feeds ranks 1, 2 and 3.

eq231_current_lean_split.fact: The source package is split into mem_iff_source, source_subset_gapCarrier and admissible_iff_source; existing theorems assemble full membership iff from these fields.

v4_interpretation: Batch 003 already supplies proof cards and router indices. v4 adds mission contracts, acceptance rubrics, patch-scoring scripts and field-level burndown prompts.
guardrail: The creative pack and operational crosswalk are not source evidence and must not be imported into YangMillsCore.
